title: Invoices

sinceLastInvoice.pickCustomer: Pick a client to anchor the range to their last invoice.
sinceLastInvoice.firstInvoice: No prior invoice for this client — including everything uninvoiced.
sinceLastInvoice.previousEnd: Anchored to the day after the previous invoice's service period ({date}).

by_project.label: By project
by_project.help: One line per project — the typical format clients expect.

by_task.label: By task
by_task.help: One line per category — useful when scope-of-work is task-based.

by_person.label: By person
by_person.help: One line per consultant — surfaces who did the work.

detailed.label: Detailed
detailed.help: One line per time entry — full transparency.

empty.title: No matching entries
empty.help: Adjust the date range or pick a different client.
empty.allFiltered: {count, plural, =1 {This client has 1 uninvoiced entry, but none fall in the selected range.} other {This client has # uninvoiced entries, but none fall in the selected range.}}
empty.zeroForCustomer: This client has no uninvoiced billable entries.

orphans.message: {count, plural, =1 {1 uninvoiced entry sits outside this date range — likely a stragger from before the last invoice.} other {# uninvoiced entries sit outside this date range — likely straggers from before the last invoice.}}

new.submitDisabledHint: Add billable entries to enable. Pick a client and a date range that includes uninvoiced work.

noInvoices: No invoices yet. Create one from unbilled time entries.
selectClientDescription: Choose a client to see their unbilled time entries.
noUnbilledTime: No unbilled time entries for this client.

actions.voidConfirmInputLabel: Type the invoice number ({number}) to confirm
actions.deleteConfirmInputLabel: Type the invoice number ({number}) to confirm deletion

statusDescription.void: This invoice has been voided and cannot be collected.
statusDescription.overdue: Payment for this invoice is past due.
